summary: Iteration 39: Testing Destination Info Fix and Transaction Edit Feature (P0 Fixes). Backend: 13/13 tests PASSED. Frontend: Edit dialog works correctly with all fields. Destination names display correctly in transaction table.

issues: Treasury destination option missing for deposits in the Create New Request dialog. It exists in EditableRequestCard but not in the create dialog.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/transactions enriches psp_name from PSP collection
Backend: GET /api/transactions enriches vendor_name from vendors collection
Backend: GET /api/transactions enriches destination_account_name from treasury collection
Backend: PUT /api/transactions/{id} allows editing CRM Reference on pending transactions
Backend: PUT /api/transactions/{id} allows editing Amount on pending transactions
Backend: PUT /api/transactions/{id} allows editing Reference on pending transactions
Backend: PUT /api/transactions/{id} blocks editing on approved transactions (400)
Backend: PUT /api/transactions/{id} blocks editing on rejected transactions (400)
Backend: CRM Reference uniqueness validation during edit
Backend: Reference uniqueness validation during edit
Backend: Deposit request auto-processing with PSP correctly populates psp_name
Backend: Deposit request auto-processing with vendor correctly populates vendor_name
Backend: Deposit request auto-processing with treasury correctly populates destination_account_name
Frontend: Login and navigation to Transactions page works
Frontend: Transactions table displays destination column with names (usdt, Abshar Exchanger, uni PSP, network PSP, Treasury)
Frontend: Edit Transaction dialog opens from green pencil icon on pending transactions
Frontend: Edit dialog contains CRM Reference input field
Frontend: Edit dialog contains Amount input field
Frontend: Edit dialog contains Reference input field
Frontend: Edit dialog contains Save Changes button
action_items: MINOR: Add 'treasury' option to destination type dropdown in New Transaction Request dialog (TransactionRequests.js line 881)
critical_code_review_comments: server.py lines 889-896: TransactionUpdate model correctly includes crm_reference, amount, reference fields
server.py lines 6676-6681: Edit validation correctly restricts editable fields to pending transactions only
server.py lines 6684-6699: CRM Reference and Reference uniqueness validation implemented correctly
server.py lines 7305-7311: Deposit auto-processing correctly populates destination_account_name, vendor_name, psp_name
server.py lines 7526-7531: Manual processing (withdrawals) correctly populates destination names
server.py lines 6248-6272: GET /api/transactions correctly enriches psp_name, vendor_name, destination_account_name from respective collections
Transactions.js lines 618-651: openFieldEdit and handleSaveFieldEdit functions correctly implemented
Transactions.js lines 2116-2150: Edit Transaction dialog has all required fields with data-testid attributes
seed_data_creation: Created test transactions for PSP, Vendor, and Treasury destinations via transaction requests API
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 fixes verified: (1) Destination info (psp_name, vendor_name, destination_account_name) is correctly enriched in both auto-processing (deposits) and manual processing (withdrawals) - data is stored in transaction document and also enriched on GET. (2) Edit Transaction dialog works for CRM Reference, Amount, Reference on pending transactions. Editing is blocked on non-pending transactions. Uniqueness validation works for CRM Reference and Reference. Minor issue: New Transaction Request dialog missing Treasury destination option (only affects UI for creating new requests, not the backend or EditableRequestCard).
